accountId.description: The ID of the account where the folder will be listed.

fields.description: Comma-separated list of fields to include in the response. Allowed values: folderId, folderName, folderType, path, previousFolderId, isArchived, imapAccess, URI. Default: fields=folderId,folderName

accountId.description: This key is used to identify the account from which the folders have to be fetched. It is generated during account addition.

attachedMails.description: true to retrieve the emails with attachments, false to retrieve all emails.

fields.description: Comma-separated list of fields to include in the response. Allowed values: summary,sentDateInGMT,calendarType,subject,messageId,threadCount,flagid,status2,priority,hasInline,toAddress,folderId,ccAddress,threadId,hasAttachment,size,sender,receivedTime,fromAddress,status. Default: fields=subject,messageId,folderId,fromAddress,toAddress,receivedTime

flaggedMails.description: true to retrieve flagged emails, false to retrieve all emails.

flagid.description: Possible values: 0 - flag_not_set 1 - info 2 - important 3 - followup

folderId.description: The unique identifier for the folder from which the emails need to be retrieved. This can be fetched using the Get all folders API.

includearchive.description: true to include archived emails, false to not include archived emails.

includesent.description: true to include sent emails, false to not include sent emails.

includeto.description: true to include to details, false to not include to details.

inlinedMails.description: true to retrieve the emails with inline images, false to retrieve all emails.

labelid.description: The unique identifier for the label used to retrieve emails based on a specific label.

limit.description: The number of emails to be retrieved from the start value mentioned. Allowed values:- Min. value:- 1 and max. value:- 200.

respondedMails.description: true to retrieve emails with replies, false to retrieve all emails.

sortBy.description: The basis on which the sorting of the list of emails should be done.

sortorder.description: true for ascending order, false for descending order

start.description: The starting sequence number of the emails to be retrieved.

status.description: Retrieve emails by read or unread status.

threadId.description: The unique identifier for the flag used to retrieve emails of the given threadId.

threadedMails.description: true to retrieve threaded emails, false to retrieve all emails.

accountId.description: This key is used to identify the account from which the folders have to be fetched. It is generated during account addition.

folderId.description: This key is used to identify the folder to be used.

messageId.description: This key is used to identify the message to be used.

includeBlockContent.description: This parameter specifies whether to include the block quote content in an email along with the email content.
